artPrompt: A frenzied goblin bureaucrat in a riotous town square, cradling an overstuffed blank ballot box while cramming slips in with both clawed hands, sparks and confetti raining around him, bonfire glow flickering across his manic grin; overturned boxes and torn blank bunting blur into ember-red haze and night-black smoke, gleeful chaos softened with a wistful warmth, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Ballot Box Goblin
text:
When Ballot Box Goblin enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 red Voter creature token.
Mandate — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more Voters, Ballot Box Goblin gets +2/+0 until end of turn. (Voters love a candidate who shows up.)
flavorText: He counts every vote twice and most of them three times.
